title: Creating Sustainable Livelihoods
summary: Providing tools, resources and support that help beneficiaries start or grow small businesses.
challenge: Many individuals lacked the resources needed to establish sustainable sources of income.
response: Business support, equipment and empowerment resources were provided to selected beneficiaries.
impact: Beneficiaries gained opportunities to improve income and support their families.
story: Economic empowerment creates lasting impact beyond immediate assistance.
The Foundation supported beneficiaries with tools and resources to strengthen livelihoods.
Participants received practical assistance aimed at promoting self-reliance.
Many beneficiaries have since expanded their income-generating activities.

quote.text: The equipment I received helped me restart my business and support my family.
quote.author: Business Empowerment Beneficiary
